---
title: "Publications"
description: >-
  Peer-reviewed publications, preprints and conference presentations by
  Natalia Gumińska, PhD. Searchable and filterable.
pagetitle: "Publications"
toc: true
listing:
  # The listing reads publications.yml directly. Adding a paper there is the
  # only step needed for it to appear here, in the RSS feed, and in the filter
  # vocabulary.
  id: papers
  contents: publications.yml
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, title, journal]
  filter-ui: [title, author, journal, categories]
  categories: cloud
  fields: [date, title, author, journal, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    journal: "Published in"
  date-format: "YYYY"
  page-size: 25
  feed:
    title: "Natalia Gumińska — publications"
    type: partial
---

::: {.lead}
Peer-reviewed articles and preprints. Use the search box to filter by any field,
or click a category to narrow the list. The complete and canonical record is on
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4599-2897) and
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Xx8ApXAAAAAJ&hl=en).
:::

::: {#papers}
:::

## Conference presentations

Selected talks and posters. Awarded presentations are marked.

::: {.timeline .reveal}
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2024 · Edinburgh</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Detecting non-adenosine residues in poly(A) tails <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">29th Annual Meeting of the RNA Society</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2023 · Warsaw</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Poly(A) tail composition from nanopore signal <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">1st Polish RNA Meeting</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2022 · Boulder</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Signal-level analysis of RNA tailing <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">27th Annual Meeting of the RNA Society</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2019 · Rome</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Circular extrachromosomal DNA in euglenids <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">8th European Congress of Protistology</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2017 · Prague</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Intron removal order in <em>Euglena gracilis</em></div>
<div class="timeline-org">ISOP Annual Meeting — Holz-Conner Travel Award</div>
:::
:::

::: {.highlight-box}
**Presentation titles above are placeholders reconstructed from the award list in
the CV.** Replace them with the titles as submitted, or remove the ones you do
not want listed.
:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-ghost" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4599-2897"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> ORCID</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Xx8ApXAAAAAJ&hl=en"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Google Scholar</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="../cv/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i> CV</a>
:::
